subject: FW: Mail piece
body:
From: David Gold [mailto:dgold@goldcommunications.com] 
Sent: Monday, December 03, 2007 12:47 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Mail piece

 

Leslie,
I'm forwarding the email below (and the attached mail piece) that I've
sent to Jay Lefkowitz. This was a follow up to my initial email to him
that included the Opinion Letter from my election law attorney that I'd
previously sent to you.
Please let me know if you have any questions.
Thanks,
Dave Gold




------ Forwarded Message
From: David Gold <dgold@goldcommunications.com>
Date: Mon, 03 Dec 2007 10:25:35 -0700
To: Jay Lefkowitz <lefkowitz@kirkland.com>
Conversation: Mail piece
Subject: Mail piece

Jay,

Per your request, I have attached a copy of the issue advocacy mail
piece.

Also, for your information, my election law attorney has reviewed the
piece and wrote back to me the following:

Dave - per your request, I've reviewed this mail piece and can confirm
that it is pure issue advocacy and will trigger no registration or
reporting requirement with either the FEC, the IRS, or any state or
local campaign finance disclosure board.  Hope this helps.
Best,
Joe


Please let me know if you have any questions,

Thanks,

Dave Gold 
------ End of Forwarded Message
